rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" is canonically a writing-polish directive: improve sentence clarity, eliminate redundancy, sharpen prose, and smooth paragraph transitions. Failure to improve surface quality would directly invalidate the delegation. The artifact has concrete polish targets — e.g., the abrupt pivot in paragraph 4 from calibration-transfer to BLEU to length-ratio is choppy, and several sentences carry unnecessary hedging clauses.
rationale.R1.5: Structural reorganization is peripherally in scope only: a light pass may reorder a clause or break a run-on across paragraphs, but wholesale section reordering was not requested and the narrative arc is not dysfunctional. Weight held at 0.3 (excluded from active set).
